name: Recovery and Gym Session
description: Shows players in recovery sessions, gym workouts, ice baths, or physiotherapy. Highlights the physical commitment and professionalism of the squad.
guidelines: 15-30 second Reel showing gym exercises, ice baths, stretching, and recovery equipment. Use dynamic camera angles and close-ups of exercises. Motivational or workout-themed trending audio. Text labels can name exercises for engagement. Show multiple players. Emphasize dedication and professionalism. Popular format for TikTok fitness audience crossover.
